title: justicia humilis var. lanceolata
intro: Justicia humilis var. lanceolata, also known as dwarf Justicia or Mexican honeysuckle, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Justicia humilis var. lanceolata include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
